lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਇਤੀ ਆਸ ਕਿ ਆਸ ਪੁਰਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa itee aas ki aas puraaeeai |
lines.english: My hope is so intense, that this hope alone should fulfill my hopes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਏ ਦਇਆਲ ਤ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bhe deaal ta pooraa paaeeai |
lines.english: When the True Guru becomes merciful, then I attain the Perfect Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਤਨਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਕਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਛਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai tan avagan bahut ki avagan chhaaeaa |
lines.english: My body is filled with so many demerits; I am covered with faults and demerits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਏ ਦਇਆਲ ਤ ਮਨੁ ਠਹਰਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: harihaan satigur bhe deaal ta man tthaharaaeaa |5|
lines.english: O Lord! When the True Guru becomes Merciful, then the mind is held in place. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak beant beant dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have meditated on the Lord, Infinite and Endless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਤਰੁ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਤਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dutar ihu sansaar satiguroo taraaeaa |
lines.english: This world-ocean is so difficult to cross; the True Guru has carried me across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟਿਆ ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਜਾਂ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mittiaa aavaa gaun jaan pooraa paaeaa |
lines.english: My comings and goings in reincarnation ended, when I met the Perfect Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਹਾਥਿ ਪਦਮੁ ਆਗਨਿ ਸੁਖ ਬਾਸਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: merai haath padam aagan sukh baasanaa |
lines.english: The lotus is in my hand; in the courtyard of my heart I abide in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: harihaan amrit har kaa naam satigur te paaeaa |6|
lines.english: O Lord! I have obtained the Ambrosial Nectar of the Name of the Lord from the True Guru. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਸਉ ਸੰਗਿ ਗੁਪਾਲ ਸਗਲ ਸੁਖ ਰਾਸਿ ਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: baasau sang gupaal sagal sukh raas har |
lines.english: I abide with the Lord of the World, the Treasury of Total Peace. O Lord!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖੀ ਮੋਰੈ ਕੰਠਿ ਰਤੰਨੁ ਪੇਖਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਨਾਸਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sakhee morai kantth ratan pekh dukh naasanaa |
lines.english: O my companion, the Jewel is around my neck; beholding it, sorrow is taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਤ੍ਰਿਅ ਰਾਵਣਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਸੇਈ ਤਾ ਲਾਜੀਅਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: par tria raavan jaeh seee taa laajeeeh |
lines.english: Those men who go out to enjoy other men's women shall suffer in shame.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਬਸਹਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਦਾ ਕਰਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: harihaan ridh sidh nav nidh baseh jis sadaa kar |7|
lines.english: All wealth, spiritual perfection and the nine treasures are in His Hand. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤਪ੍ਰਤਿ ਹਿਰਹਿ ਪਰ ਦਰਬੁ ਛਿਦ੍ਰ ਕਤ ਢਾਕੀਅਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: nitaprat hireh par darab chhidr kat dtaakeeeh |
lines.english: Those who steal the wealth of others - how can their guilt be concealed?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਰਮਤ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਸਗਲ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰਈ ॥
lines.translit: har gun ramat pavitr sagal kul taaree |
lines.english: Those who chant the Sacred Praises of the Lord save and redeem all their generations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਸੁਨਤੇ ਭਏ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: harihaan sunate bhe puneet paarabraham beechaaree |8|
lines.english: O Lord! Those who listen and contemplate the Supreme Lord God become pure and holy. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਚਮਕੈ ਬੀਜੁਲਿ ਮੁਖ ਕਉ ਜੋਹਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: deh dis chamakai beejul mukh kau johatee |
lines.english: Lightning flashes in the ten directions; I behold the Face of my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਪਰਿ ਬਨੈ ਅਕਾਸੁ ਤਲੈ ਧਰ ਸੋਹਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: aoopar banai akaas talai dhar sohatee |
lines.english: The sky above looks lovely, and the earth below is beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਫਿਰਉ ਬਿਦੇਸਿ ਪੀਉ ਕਤ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: khojat firau bides peeo kat paaeeai |
lines.english: If I go searching in foreign lands, how can I find my Beloved?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਜੇ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਭਾਗੁ ਤ ਦਰਸਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: harihaan je masatak hovai bhaag ta daras samaaeeai |9|
lines.english: O Lord! If such destiny is inscribed upon my forehead, I am absorbed in the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਧੋਹੁ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਬਿਧਾਤੈ ਤਾਂ ਤੂ ਸੋਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: badhohu purakh bidhaatai taan too sohiaa |
lines.english: The Primal Lord, the Architect of Destiny, has established You; thus You are adorned and embellished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਿਠੇ ਸਭੇ ਥਾਵ ਨਹੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dditthe sabhe thaav nahee tudh jehiaa |
lines.english: I have seen all places, but none can compare to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਸਮਲ ਜਾਹਿ ਨਾਇਐ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਸਰ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: harihaan naanak kasamal jaeh naaeiai raamadaas sar |10|
lines.english: O Lord! Bathing in the Sacred Pool of Raam Daas, the sins are washed away, O Nanak. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਸਦੀ ਸਘਨ ਅਪਾਰ ਅਨੂਪ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਪੁਰ ॥
lines.translit: vasadee saghan apaar anoop raamadaas pur |
lines.english: Ramdaspur is prosperous and thickly populated, and incomparably beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਲਾਗੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਤਿਸੈ ਕਉ ਆਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis sang laage praan tisai kau aaheeai |
lines.english: It longs for that, to which its breath of life is attached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਤ੍ਰਿਕ ਚਿਤ ਸੁਚਿਤ ਸੁ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਚਾਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: chaatrik chit suchit su saajan chaaheeai |
lines.english: The rainbird is very smart; in its consciousness, it longs for the friendly rain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਨੁ ਬਨੁ ਫਿਰਤ ਉਦਾਸ ਬੂੰਦ ਜਲ ਕਾਰਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: ban ban firat udaas boond jal kaarane |
lines.english: It wanders depressed, from forest to forest, for the sake of a drop of water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਤ ਕਾ ਚਿਤੁ ਅਨੂਪੁ ਮਰੰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਨੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: mit kaa chit anoop maram na jaaneeai |
lines.english: The Consciousness of my Friend is incomparably beautiful. Its mystery cannot be known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਤਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਜਨੁ ਮਾਂਗੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: harihaan tiau har jan maangai naam naanak balihaarane |11|
lines.english: O Lord! In just the same way, the humble servant of the Lord begs for the Naam, the Name of the Lord. Nanak is a sacrifice to him. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਹਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਸਮਾਇ ਤ ਹੋਵੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਘਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: chiteh chit samaae ta hovai rang ghanaa |
lines.english: When the consciousness is absorbed in the supreme consciousness, great joy and bliss are found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਹਕ ਗੁਨੀ ਅਪਾਰ ਸੁ ਤਤੁ ਪਛਾਨੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: gaahak gunee apaar su tat pachhaaneeai |
lines.english: One who purchases the priceless virtues realizes the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਚੰਚਲ ਚੋਰਹਿ ਮਾਰਿ ਤ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਧਨਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: harihaan chanchal choreh maar ta paaveh sach dhanaa |12|
lines.english: O Lord! When the fickle thieves are overcome, the true wealth is obtained. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਪਨੈ ਊਭੀ ਭਈ ਗਹਿਓ ਕੀ ਨ ਅੰਚਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: supanai aoobhee bhee gahio kee na anchalaa |
lines.english: In a dream, I was lifted up; why didn't I grasp the hem of His Robe?

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਉ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਕਹਹੁ ਕਤ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: khojau taa ke charan kahahu kat paaeeai |
lines.english: I am searching for His Feet - tell me, where can I find Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਸੋਈ ਜਤੰਨੁ ਬਤਾਇ ਸਖੀ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: harihaan soee jatan bataae sakhee priau paaeeai |13|
lines.english: O Lord! Tell me how I can find my Beloved, O my companion. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰ ਪੁਰਖ ਬਿਰਾਜਿਤ ਪੇਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਬੰਚਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: sundar purakh biraajit pekh man banchalaa |
lines.english: Gazing upon the Beautiful Lord relaxing there, my mind was charmed and fascinated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਣ ਨ ਦੇਖਹਿ ਸਾਧ ਸਿ ਨੈਣ ਬਿਹਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: nain na dekheh saadh si nain bihaaliaa |
lines.english: The eyes which do not see the Holy - those eyes are miserable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨ ਨ ਸੁਨਹੀ ਨਾਦੁ ਕਰਨ ਮੁੰਦਿ ਘਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: karan na sunahee naad karan mund ghaaliaa |
lines.english: The ears which do not hear the Sound-current of the Naad - those ears might just as well be plugged.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਜਪੈ ਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਕਰਿ ਕਟੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa japai na naam til til kar katteeai |
lines.english: The tongue which does not chant the Naam ought to be cut out, bit by bit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਜਬ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਰਾਇ ਦਿਨੋ ਦਿਨੁ ਘਟੀਐ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: harihaan jab bisarai gobid raae dino din ghatteeai |14|
lines.english: O Lord! When the mortal forgets the Lord of the Universe, the Sovereign Lord King, he grows weaker day by day. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਕਜ ਫਾਥੇ ਪੰਕ ਮਹਾ ਮਦ ਗੁੰਫਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: pankaj faathe pank mahaa mad gunfiaa |
lines.english: The wings of the bumble bee are caught in the intoxicating fragrant petals of the lotus.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਗ ਸੰਗ ਉਰਝਾਇ ਬਿਸਰਤੇ ਸੁੰਫਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ang sang urajhaae bisarate sunfiaa |
lines.english: With its limbs entangled in the petals, it loses its senses.
